Description: Single-fragment local packet (cfg[0]=0) forwarded byte-for-byte to local output

Expected Result: Payload + input CRC16 appear unchanged on data_local; no remote activity

Description: Input CRC16 forwarded unchanged on local path (NOT regenerated)
Stimulus: Drive local packet with known CRC16

Description: Local payload at min and max length

Description: Multiple fragments same SEQ_NUM arriving in order
Stimulus: Drive frags 1..N in order, same SEQ_NUM
Expected Result: Concatenated payload in FRAG_NUM order + new CRC16

Stimulus: Drive frags in shuffled order (e.g. 3,1,2), same SEQ_NUM

Description: New CRC16 computed over merged payload
Stimulus: Drive multi-frag remote packet
Expected Result: Remote output CRC16 == CRC over merged payload (not input CRCs)

Drive fragment with FRAG_NUM=0

Description: New packet starts before previous completes

Description: Counter +1 per dropped packet regardless of frag count
